## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between GrowthX and Lumos to explore potential partnership for content creation and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Lumos considering GrowthX for 2026 content strategy; budget constraints limit immediate action](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive content creation services (30k strategy sprint, 15k/mo execution)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Key differentiators: transparent workflow platform, full-service approach (creation to publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Lumos goals: hypergrowth (2x in 6 months), content refresh, and amplified distribution](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

## Topics

### Lumos Current Situation & Goals

  - [Budget constraints limit new partnerships until next fiscal year (Jan 2026)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Marketing team offsite next month to plan 2026 vision](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Primary focus: hypergrowth (2x in 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Secondary goals: content refresh, amplified distribution](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Small marketing team (Priya + support staff) seeking scalable content solution](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

### GrowthX Services & Capabilities

  - [Full-service content creation: strategy to publishing (5+ pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Transparent workflow platform for client collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Custom work streams beyond editorial (e.g., programmatic, marketplace)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Pricing: 30k strategy sprint, 15k/mo execution (9-15k for additional streams)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Comprehensive analytics: Looker dashboards, LLM visibility (Scrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [ROI tracking: traffic, impressions, clicks, conversions, rankings](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### GrowthX vs Competitors (e.g., Graphite)

  - [More cost-effective (3-5x less expensive than Graphite)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Transparent workflow vs. "behind the veil" approach](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Rapidly innovating platform](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Potential future collaboration between GrowthX and Graphite hinted](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Case Studies & Partnerships

  - [Webflow: Integrations pages, docs, marketplace strategy](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [References: Josh Grant (VP Growth), Rachel (CPO)](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Augment: Guide section driving 300+ signups/week](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lumos to discuss content strategy at upcoming marketing offsite](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Priya to present findings/recommendations to Lumos CEO](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) for deeper dive](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Potential CEO-to-CEO discussion if Lumos decides to move forward](https://fathom.video/share/D7-GpEaKYzR6VsPeoBfb6rH6QtS8eox7?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
